B) Chalazal part of synergid
C) Micropylar part of antipodal
D) Chalazal part of antipodal
Page No.-32, Easy
88. Emasculation is done in-
A) Male parent
B) Female parent
C) Both male and female parent
D) Depends on the project
Page No.-33, Easy
89. The emasculated flowers are bagged to-
A) Protect flower from strong sunlight
B) Protect flower from rain
C) Protect flower from unwanted pollen
D) Protect flower from insects
Page No.-33, Easy
90. If female parent produces unisexual
flowers, there is-
A) no need of emasculation & bagging
B) need of emasculation & bagging
C) no need of emasculation but bagging is
needed
D) no need of bagging but emasculation is
needed
Page No.-33, Easy

figure-
np 8 Ly
12-418)
lo) ou 1
Wi!
Si
A) 1 B) II
C) 1m D) IV
Page No.-32, Easy
2.3 Double Fertilization

A) Cytoplasm of Egg cell
B) Nucleus of Egg cell
C) Cytoplasm of Synergids
D) Cytoplasm of Antipodals
Page No.-34, Easy
93. Which of the following is incorrect about
double fertilization?
